backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Student, Account, Transaction, BankDetail, UserProfile) and CRUD operations for each, with role-based access control enforced via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the admin credentials hint was removed from the Login page, referencing the affected file and associated test ID REQ-16.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of key frontend source files, describing the purpose and notable changes of App.tsx, Student.tsx, BankDetails.tsx, and Login.tsx.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the default (non-customized) UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Student Bank' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages authentication state from localStorage, handles login/logout, enforces role-based page access, and renders the appropriate page inside DashboardLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Minimal React Query hook file exposing a useBackendStatus query; notes that core functionality uses localStorage rather than backend calls.
frontend/src/index.css: Primary application stylesheet importing Poppins/Nunito fonts, defining custom light/dark theme tokens, gradient utility classes, print styles, and scrollbar styling for the Student Bank UI.
frontend/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx: Defines the main dashboard layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, user session display, and role-based menu filtering for admin vs regular users.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Account.tsx: Account management page allowing admins to create, edit, delete, and search student bank accounts with form validation and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/pages/BankDetails.tsx: Bank details management page for adding, editing, deleting, and searching bank records (name, taluka, district, IFSC), with admin-only write access.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Transaction history page that searches transactions by account number and optional date range, with print and CSV download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Dashboard home page displaying summary statistics cards (total students, accounts, deposits, withdrawals, balance) loaded from localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Renders a login form that authenticates an admin user (hardcoded credentials) or a student user (account number as both username and password) and stores the session via localStorage utilities.
frontend/src/pages/PassbookPrint.tsx: Displays a printable passbook for a given account number, showing account holder details, transaction history, and current balance; supports both admin search and auto-load for logged-in users.
frontend/src/pages/Student.tsx: Provides a CRUD interface for managing student records, including a searchable list, add/edit modal form with validation, and delete confirmation, all backed by localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/Transaction.tsx: Handles deposit and withdrawal transactions for a selected account, validates input (including sufficient balance for withdrawals), persists transactions to localStorage, and displays the account's transaction history.
frontend/src/utils/localStorage.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and CRUD helper functions for all data entities (students, accounts, transactions, bank details, and auth session) stored in browser localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Poppins/Nunito), OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, breakpoints, and animation keyframes; includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) describing a Student Bank mobile SPA with admin/user roles, sidebar navigation, Motoko canister backend for cross-device sync, and a catalogue of implemented features and known issues.
